===Pokémon Evolutions===
[[File:Mars Evolutions.png|thumb|250px|Mars (right) in [[Pokémon Evolutions]]]]
Mars briefly appeared in a flashback in ''[[PE05|The Rival]]''. She used her {{TP|Mars|Purugly}} to battle {{ga|Lucas}} and his {{p|Infernape}} alongside [[Jupiter]] at the [[Spear Pillar]], but was quickly defeated.
